pages.text: Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)30-second Regeneration IV$(li)1-minute Resistance IV$(li)Attacks summon hellfire at target's feet, granting debuff immunity and halving incoming damage$(li)When damaged, 50% chance to summon a zombie piglin brute minion (3-minute duration)$(br)All effects last 15 minutes except summoning, which lasts 30 minutes (duration reduced by 1 minute per minion summoned)
